instruction: Three things wrong with the briefcase icon: the base outline is cyan, the thin black frame square is green (wrong color), AND the thin black frame square has drifted out of place. Fix everything.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/briefcase.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #06b6d4" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M16 21V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="#22c55e" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="-4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/briefcase.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="2" y="7" width="20" height="14" rx="2" ry="2"/><path d="M16 21V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2h-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16"/></g>
  <rect id="frame" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="1" x="4" y="4" width="120" height="120" />
</svg>
